mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY m.sort_order
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, menu_name, menu_code, menu_type, icon, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuCode}, #{menuType}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id=#{parentId}, menu_name=#{menuName}, menu_code=#{menuCode}, menu_type=#{menuType}, icon=#{icon}, sort_order=#{sortOrder}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
